deterministic_issues.text: Verb 'каже' (VESUM: verb:imperf:pres:s:3) in pre-verb module M2. Verbs are forbidden before M15.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace verb 'каже' with an English equivalent or a noun phrase. Students haven't learned verbs yet.
